steps: Visit the website and explore services
Receive session details and payment information

faq.question: What is tarot reading and how can it help me?
faq.answer: Tarot reading is an intuitive practice that provides guidance and clarity on life decisions, relationships, career, and spiritual growth. Each reading helps you understand the energy around your questions and empowers you to make confident choices.

faq.question: How does EFT tapping work?
faq.answer: EFT (Emotional Freedom Technique) combines ancient acupressure with modern psychology. By tapping on specific meridian points while focusing on emotional issues, you can release blocks, reduce anxiety, and clear limiting beliefs.

faq.question: Do you offer online sessions?
faq.answer: Yes! Tarot readings, EFT tapping, and counselling are available both online and offline. Tantra sessions are preferably conducted offline for deeper work, but online options are available.

faq.question: How much does a session cost?
faq.answer: Prices vary by service: Tarot readings start from Rs. 1,500, EFT tapping from Rs. 2,000, Tantra sessions from Rs. 3,000, and Counselling from Rs. 2,500. The Abundance Breakthrough Program is Rs. 1,00,000 for 6 weeks.

faq.question: Where are you located?
faq.answer: We are based in Wakad, Pune, Maharashtra, India. We serve clients in Pune, Mumbai, and across India through online sessions.

faq.question: How do I book a session?
faq.answer: You can book by contacting us on WhatsApp at +91 8698304955 or emailing marigoldmagick@harshaagurnani.com. We'll schedule a consultation and provide all session details.

faq.question: What should I expect in my first session?
faq.answer: Your first session will be a warm, safe space to share your concerns. We'll discuss your goals, explain the process, and begin the healing work tailored to your needs.

faq.question: Is everything confidential?
faq.answer: Absolutely. All sessions are completely confidential. Your privacy and trust are our top priorities.
